description_long: This is a young adult pedestrian dressed in a modern, urban style. The individual wears a cropped jacket with rolled sleeves, featuring visible patches and a large graphic on the back, paired with fitted leggings. Accessories include a baseball cap, a face mask, and fingerless gloves, giving a streetwear or urban explorer vibe. The person has visible tattoos on the midriff and arms, and is wearing slip-on shoes. The overall appearance is athletic and casual, with a focus on comfort and mobility. The figure's posture is relaxed, standing upright with arms slightly bent at the sides.
description: A young adult in urban streetwear with a cropped jacket, leggings, cap, face mask, and slip-on shoes, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cropped jacket, face mask, cap, tattoos, and fingerless gloves clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the cropped jacket, and the arm tattoos.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large graphic on the back of the jacket, the fitted leggings, and the back of the cap.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the cap, jacket, and visible tattoos on the arm and midriff.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped urban jacket, fitted leggings, baseball cap, face mask, fingerless gloves
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair tucked under cap
